fullArticle:
Last year, former Chubby And The Gang frontman Charlie Manning Walker formed a new band called EZ8 and shared a four-song demo. Now, we're getting more information about and music from that project.

It turns out EZ8 is a shortened version of the band name, which is the East Eight. Along with Walker, the London-based hardcore punk group has members from the Chisel, Arms Race, Stingray, and Last Affront. Their debut album The Easy Way Out arrives later this summer, and it compiles songs from last year's demo with brand-new tracks, including "Fear As A Gift," which is out today. Dive in below.

TRACKLIST:01 "Drop Me Out"02 "Right Behind You"03 "The Easy Eight"04 "The Descent"05 "19.15.19."06 "Hanging On The Wall"07 "Fear As A Gift"08 "The Descent"

The Easy Way Out is out 8/29 via Static Sho...
